CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise
Off Calendar Sep-10-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Calendared in error - duplicate entry.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Sep-11-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for hearing in Dept. 208 for hearing on compromise of a minor's claim. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Perez. Craig M. Boeger, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Also present were Hadia Sattar, minor and Amani Sattar, the grandmother. The court signed the proposed compromise as follows: Settlement: $4,000.00; Medical Liens: $1,358.96; Fees & Costs: $1,300.06 and the net balance of $1,340.98 placed into a blocked account until the minor attains age 18. Court also signs order to deposit money into a blocked account.
